summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration; import java.time.Duration; import java.time.Instant; public class ExecutionMetrics { private final Instant startedAt; private final Instant finishedAt; private final Duration totalDuration; public ExecutionMetrics(Instant startedAt, Instant finishedAt) { this.startedAt = startedAt; this.finishedAt = finishedAt; this.totalDuration = Duration.between(startedAt, finishedAt); } public Instant getStartedAt() { return startedAt; } public Instant getFinishedAt() { return finishedAt; } public Duration getTotalDuration() { return totalDuration;
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
